reason_for_call: Triage my email and reply to one message

reply_points: approve moving the vaccination fridge service to Wednesday afternoon
ask facilities to confirm the exact arrival window
remind staff to keep backup coolers ready during the service visit
thank her for flagging it early

attributes.subject: Need your decision: fridge maintenance reschedule
attributes.body: The vendor can no longer come Tuesday morning for the vaccination fridge service. They offered Wednesday afternoon instead. I need your approval before I confirm with facilities and notify nursing.

attributes.subject: Updated copier lease quote
attributes.body: Sending over the revised monthly lease estimate for the front office copier. No action needed today unless you want me to proceed this week.

attributes.subject: FYI: resident shadowing schedule posted
attributes.body: I uploaded the final resident shadowing schedule for this month. Just an FYI so you know the front desk requests should taper off.
